task: Position History tracking for Integrity/Positioned-Parts. Immutable audit trail of part installations/removals/replacements per unit position.
details: Migration: maint.position_history table with tenant RLS and FORCE
Backend API: CRUD routes for position history with auth pattern from maintenance services
Frontend: PositionHistoryPage with filters and timeline view
note: Builds on M1's position_set/part_position_assignment. Appends immutable history records only - no updates/deletes.
